'''dharada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ujamaa|ujamaa]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-r-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ujamaa|ujamaa]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dharada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhærædæth|dhærædæth]] || [[word:dhærædæj|dhærædæj]] || [[word:dhærædæsh|dhærædæsh]] || [[word:dhærædæ|dhærædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhararadath|dhararadath]] || [[word:dhararadaj|dhararadaj]] || [[word:dhararadash|dhararadash]] || [[word:dhararada|dhararada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dharadath|dharadath]] || [[word:dharadaj|dharadaj]] || [[word:dharadash|dharadash]] || [[word:dharada|dharada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dharafdath|dharafdath]] || [[word:dharafdaj|dharafdaj]] || [[word:dharafdash|dharafdash]] || [[word:dharafdaf|dharafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dharadatha|dharadatha]] || [[word:dharadaja|dharadaja]] || [[word:dharadasha|dharadasha]] || [[word:dharadaka|dharadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dharadath|dharadath]] || [[word:dharadaj|dharadaj]] || [[word:dharadash|dharadash]] || [[word:dharada|dharada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dharadathal|dharadathal]] || [[word:dharadajal|dharadajal]] || [[word:dharadashal|dharadashal]] || [[word:dharadakal|dharadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dharadathatha|dharadathatha]] || [[word:dharadajaja|dharadajaja]] || [[word:dharadashasha|dharadashasha]] || [[word:dharadaka|dharadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dharadathan|dharadathan]] || [[word:dharadajan|dharadajan]] || [[word:dharadashan|dharadashan]] || [[word:dharadakan|dharadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dharadathaoro|dharadathaoro]] || [[word:dharadajaoro|dharadajaoro]] || [[word:dharadashaoro|dharadashaoro]] || [[word:dharadakaoro|dharadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
